cited_sources.story_title: DOE $89M Coal Grant for AI Data Center Power
NSF Decommissioning Ocean Station Papa, Gulf of Alaska
Federal AI Preemption Bill; Alaska Regulatory Vacuum

new_sources_to_consider.rationale: Energy-sector newsletter; covered DOE coal-for-AI announcement June 4 with specific Alaska content. Strong infrastructure beat source.
North of 60 Mining News; covers Alaska energy and AI-in-mining intersections; June 5 piece on AI mineral exploration tools returned 403 on fetch — recommend manual review.
Data Center Dynamics; consistent depth on Alaska data center proposals (Stak, Air Force, GCI-Quintillion).
Closest local outlet to Sealaska Heritage Institute and UAS; published Sealaska/Tlingit AI translator story May 21.
American Geophysical Union; published Ocean Observatories Initiative dismantlement story with Alaska Station Papa named.
National Fisherman; Alaska-specific AI and fisheries technology coverage with author bylines.
ArcticToday; independent Arctic-focused outlet covering Alaska tech, drone trials, and military activity.
Fairbanks Daily News-Miner; covered Air Force data center RFP power-supply hurdles with original reporting; Interior Alaska perspective not in seed list.

beat_b_note: No in-window Beat B (Research & Indigenous AI) stories found for this window. Nearest miss: Sealaska Heritage/Tlingit AI translator partnership (Juneau Empire, May 21) — 9 days pre-window, source page 404'd. Monitor for follow-up coverage.

beat_c_supplemental.note: Pub date May 18 (outside window). Watch for in-window coverage when competition runs mid-June.
